narrative:
Wilmington City has 7,236 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.7 percentage points.
